articles.title: Improving instruction hierarchy in frontier LLMs
articles.summary: IH-Challenge trains models to prioritize trusted instructions, improving instruction hierarchy, safety steerability, and resistance to prompt injection attacks.

articles.title: New ways to learn math and science in ChatGPT
articles.summary: ChatGPT introduces interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore formulas, variables, and concepts in real time.

articles.title: OpenAI to acquire Promptfoo
articles.summary: OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform that helps enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems during development.

articles.title: How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale
articles.summary: Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.

articles.title: Codex Security: now in research preview
articles.summary: Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise.

articles.title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
articles.summary: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.
